sources.text: Civic Ward ivory blind alley initial offer: the situation has reached a decision point. The faction is accepting operators through any of the three public lanes, but only one aligns with the current regime.

rules.label: You inspected the social framing before acting.
auditor was the correct social read for the public regime.
broker signaled the wrong reading and cost you standing.
penitent poisoned the trust window.
The faction offer expired.

public_requirements.label: Civic Ward standing 6+ unlocks the trusted tier.
Debt 44 or lower preserves trusted handling.
